stemHtml: A cabin crew member asks the Captain if they are allowed to drink the night before a duty. The duty starts the next morning at 09:00 and the departure time is scheduled for 11:00. Which of the following statements is correct?

options.a: The crew must stop drinking alcohol by 1 a.m. and the blood alcohol level must be below 0.02% by/before 9 a.m. (duty report time) for an 11 a.m. flight.
options.b: The crew is able to drink until 3 a.m. before a 9 a.m. duty report time for an 11 a.m. flight thus giving 8 hours between drinking and the scheduled departure time.
options.c: Alcohol level must be below 0.02% by 11 a.m. as this is the scheduled departure time.
options.d: The crew must stop drinking alcohol by 1 a.m. and the blood alcohol level must be below 0.02% by 11 a.m.
